researchSummaries.summary: Key themes: Concept vectors gaining traction for detection/mitigation, training-free methods emerging (LatentBiopsy), multi-agent safety research active. Reward hacking shows three-phase rebound pattern with representation-level signatures detectable without retraining.

ideas: LinkedIn strategy: Share AI insights + case studies targeting SMB owners, post in AI groups
Twitter/X: Daily AI tips + thread format for 'AI for Business' content
Reddit: Participate in r/artificial, r/LocalLLM, r/MachineLearning - answer questions, share insights
AI communities: Discord servers, Slack groups for AI practitioners and business owners
Free tools audit: Offer quick website AI-opportunity assessment
Guest posts: Pitch AI-focused blogs and publications
